title: CV
text:

title: Clara Brügge
text:
PhD Researcher in Environmental Politics ETH Zürich
I study climate policy, political economy, and public opinion using survey-experimental methods. My research examines how people perceive and respond to the costs and trade-offs of decarbonization.
cbrugge@ethz.ch · GitHub
